title: QuantityConstraints
description:
Quantity constraints on selection. Can apply either to items or selections
with an options group.

Note\: We use a `minAmount` of 1 with a `maxAmount` of 1 to indicate
selection is required

defaultAmount.description: (Optional) Default amount that can be select

minAmount.description: (Optional) Minimum amount that must be select

maxAmount.description: (Optional) Maximum amount that can be select
